productDisplayName: Puma Women BodyTrain Alt White Sports Shoes
description: These stylish shoes from puma tones the front and back leg muscles to enhance natural movement and overall look. These lightweight shoes are great or regular wear since their attractive low-profile design makes it perfect for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees and walk your way to sexy everywhere you go. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Perforations on the uppers and mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Elasticated loop with velcro closure for a snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feet Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort puma formstripes on the sides Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on velcro closure Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Soft-density IdCell technology compresses the midsole to create resistance as you move IdCell technology continues through the front of the sole to create resistance and increased muscle activation in the front of your legs and calves Outsole Beveled heel maximizes leg extension in each stride Groove running the length of the sole counteracts pronation and increases stability
